STATF401.description: STAT-F401 course materials: lecture transcripts, lecture slides (OCR'd), and the Weisberg *Applied Linear Regression* textbook. Ask here for anything about the statistics/regression class.

workbook.description: Gabe's Workbook: general scientific papers, technical notes, and scripts collected for reference. Ask here for research papers and general science/engineering material not tied to a specific course.
